dept_mcd_zone_desc: MCD administrative zones overseeing municipal services across Delhi.
dept_mcd_ward_desc: MCD wards with elected councillors responsible for local civic issues.
dept_djb_zone_desc: Delhi Jal Board zones managing water supply and sewerage infrastructure.
dept_bses_division_desc: BSES Rajdhani and BSES Yamuna electricity distribution divisions.
dept_police_district_desc: Delhi Police district jurisdictions for law and order.
dept_police_traffic_desc: Delhi Traffic Police jurisdictions for traffic management and enforcement.
dept_election_pc_desc: Parliamentary constituencies electing Members of Parliament to the Lok Sabha.
dept_election_ac_desc: Assembly constituencies electing Members of Legislative Assembly to the Delhi Vidhan Sabha.
dept_admin_district_desc: Revenue districts headed by District Magistrates for general administration.
dept_admin_taluk_desc: Sub-divisions headed by Sub-Divisional Magistrates for revenue and administrative matters.
dept_pincode_desc: Postal PIN code areas served by India Post offices.
